mock_server: OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions SSE, no choices[0].token_ids on content chunks, final usage.completion_tokens present

legacy_llama_benchy.stdout_contains: No token_ids in response, using local tokenization

usage_fixed_llama_benchy.client_py: current patched client.py using final usage.completion_tokens as total_tokens
usage_fixed_llama_benchy.stdout_contains: No token_ids in response, using local tokenization

conclusion: Legacy llama-benchy sees the mock OpenAI stream, falls back to local tokenization of each SSE delta.content chunk, counts 3 chunk-local tokens for a response whose joined text/final usage is 2 tokens, and inflates TG throughput versus the usage-based path.
